Meaning: PATTERN, not used directly — a recurring action. Store the literal ('Every 3/3/3 seconds'). A recurrence is a WHEN, so it is a Trigger; Condition means only-if and cannot express a schedule.
Every other cast — the 2nd, 4th, 6th … (Yorick's BIG ghoul).
The champion was HIT by an attack. The mirror of 'On Attack', which is the champion attacking — Amumu stacks Armor when attacked, not when attacking.
